title: rubus oigocladus var. newbouldii
intro: Rubus oigocladus var. newbouldii, also known as the Newbould's black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus oigocladus species of thorny shrubs in the rose family. This plant is native to the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus oigocladus var. newbouldii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus oigocladus var. newbouldii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
